creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 229722
patch

Hi,

I recently updated my system to latest HEAD and found out telegram-desktop failed to build with the error at the end of the message.

Please note that to get to that error you should first apply the patch in bug #260042

I found out an upstream patch that fixes the issue, I'm attaching patch to the ports tree including it.

obtained from: https://github.com/ericniebler/range-v3/commit/0487cca29e352e8f16bbd91fda38e76e39a0ed28

------------------------
